title: The Central Government Hereby By Constitutes A Quality Review Board Consisting Of The Following Persons.

TJW, ^ R r r ^ - 6 4 1 002 2. =r=ilftrli) ^ e l 1 = M ^fti ^ 3J«TO 3ffT TP^Tf ^ ifci $ fcpR sftl ^ ' 3fa *r?t ^ T ^ ^ + M ' & =WlPd<il w f t " ^fft itei ^ f w n sfa ^ cmr q i f w r , 2006 ?ro [ m "H. 1/22/2006-^1^1+11] MINISTRY OFCORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th June, 2007 G.S.R. 448(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 28A of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949), the Central Government hereby constitutes sT Quality Review Board consisting of the following persons, namely:— (1) Shri K.N. Memani, Chairperson Chairman, KNM Advisory Pvt. Ltd., lstFloor,W-2,G.K.Part-n, New Delhi. (2) Shri A.K. Awasthi, Member Director General (Commercial) Office of the Comptroller & Auditor General of India, 10, Bahadur Shah Zafar Marg, New Delhi-110002. 3) ShriP.S.Sharma, Member General Manager, Department of Banking Supervision, Reserve Bank of Indi::, Central Office, Centre 1, World Trade Centre, Colaba, Mumbai-400005. (4) Dr. B.C. Jain, CA, , Member B.C. Jain & Co., Chartered Accountants, 16/77A, Civil Lines, Kanpur-208 001. (5) Shri Dushyant Tyagi, CA Member - C-90, Upkar Apartment, 18-Mayur Vihar, Phase-I, Extension, NewDelhi-110091. (6) Shri R. Vasudevan, Regional Director (SR), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Shastri Bhavan, Haddows Road, Chennai. Nominees of the Council (7) Mr. Ved Jain, FCA, M/s. Ved Jain & Associates, 33, BabarRoad, 1st Floor, Bengali Market, New Delhi-110001. Member Member Member Member Member (8) Mr. Jayant Gokhale, FCA M/s.Gokhalc&Sathe, 101,Laxmi Kant, AWing, 214, S itaram Keer Marg, Off. T.H.Kataria Marg, ' Mahim, Mumbai-400016. (9) Mr. Manoj Fadnis, FCA M/s. Fadnis & Gupte, B-14, RatlamKothi, Kanchan Bagh Main Road, Indore-452001(M.P.) (10) Mr.K.P.Khandelwal.FCA M/s.K.Khandelwal&Co., P-2, New CJT Road, lstFloor,RoomNo. 107, Kolkata-700073 (11) Mr. G, Ramaswamy, FCA M/s. G. Ramaswamy & Co., GR Chamber, 66, Logamanya Street (W), R. S. Puram, Coimbatore-641002 2. The terms and conditions of service and allowances of the Chairperson and Member^ of the Quality Review Board shall be governed by the Chartered Accountants Procedures of Meetings of Quality Review Board, and Terms and Conditions of Service and allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Board, Rules, 2006. 3. This notification shall take effect from the date of publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No.l/22/2006-IGCJ JTTESH KHOSLA, Jt. Secy.
